task: feat: add slugify() helper to utils/text.py — lowercase the input, convert runs of whitespace to single hyphens, strip all other non-alphanumeric characters. Include unit tests covering unicode input and the empty string.
diff:
diff --git a/utils/text.py b/utils/text.py
index 3f1c2aa..9b04d11 100644
--- a/utils/text.py
+++ b/utils/text.py
@@ -1,5 +1,18 @@
 """Small text utilities shared by the report generators."""

+import re
+import unicodedata
+
+
+def slugify(value: str) -> str:
+    """Lowercase, whitespace runs -> single hyphen, drop other punctuation."""
+    value = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", value)
+    value = value.encode("ascii", "ignore").decode("ascii")
+    value = value.lower()
+    value = re.sub(r"\s+", "-", value.strip())
+    return re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9-]", "", value)
+

 def truncate(value: str, limit: int) -> str:
     return value if len(value) <= limit else value[: limit - 1] + "\u2026"
diff --git a/tests/test_text.py b/tests/test_text.py
index 77aa210..c1d9e02 100644
--- a/tests/test_text.py
+++ b/tests/test_text.py
@@ -8,3 +8,17 @@ def test_truncate_long():
     assert truncate("abcdef", 4) == "abc\u2026"
+
+
+def test_slugify_basic():
+    assert slugify("Hello  World!") == "hello-world"
+
+
+def test_slugify_unicode():
+    assert slugify("Caf\u00e9 con  Leche") == "cafe-con-leche"
+
+
+def test_slugify_empty():
+    assert slugify("") == ""
rationale: Textbook approval: feature task fully implemented, tests included for the asked-for edge cases (unicode, empty string), evidence shows the suite green. Any rejection here is a false-reject regression.
